data.body: VERIFIED GREEN ON MAIN. Change 530 (patchset 2, rebased onto 5e1a59491) merged as 2cc3870d4. The optionality workflow run 29161429532 on that exact commit: ALL jobs success — 'clean core wheel (no extras -> heavy deps absent)': success (the job that was red), 'import-linter': success, per-extra + union: success. The original CI-red is resolved on main, confirmed by the actual optionality job (not just the Verified vote, which by design does not run it).
